title:
Party Support for Legislation with NZBORA Section 7 Rights Concerns
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## Party Support for Legislation with NZBORA Section 7 Rights Concerns
The number of government and non-government bills that have passed into law with Attorney-General reports detailing concerns of rights incompatibility under Section 7 of the Bill of Rights Act 1990 between 2010 - 2025. How each political party voted for each piece of relevant legislation and the total number of yay's and nay's each piece of legislation received at their respective final readings/in order to pass into law.
A lack of clarity surrounding how often Section 7 reports are published and how often political parties of all ideologies support rights constraining legislation regardless of the reasonableness of those constraints.

#### Likely Source Agency
Office of the Clerk of the House of Representatives
